meta.title: About Us
meta.description: Learn more about our motorcycle maintenance and repair service center.

aboutHeroSection.heading: About the Service Center
aboutHeroSection.description: With over 10 years of experience in the motorcycle maintenance and repair industry, XYZ Service Center is committed to providing high-quality services and maximum customer satisfaction. We continuously strive to improve service quality and meet the increasing demands of our customers.
aboutHeroSection.missionDesc: Our mission is to provide high-quality motorcycle maintenance and repair services, ensuring safety and absolute satisfaction for customers. We are committed to offering optimal and prompt solutions to keep your vehicle running smoothly.
aboutHeroSection.visionDesc: XYZ Service Center aims to become a trusted leading name in the motorcycle maintenance and repair industry, not only locally but nationwide. We aspire to raise service standards, constantly innovate and develop to serve our customers in the best possible way.

awards.title: Excellent Service Certificate 2022
awards.description: Awarded by the Vietnam Engineering Association for outstanding contributions in vehicle maintenance.

awards.title: Best Customer Service Award
awards.description: Honored at the National Motorcycle Industry Exhibition 2022.

faqs.question: How often should I maintain my motorcycle?
faqs.answer: You should typically maintain your motorcycle every 1,000 – 1,500 km or every 2 – 3 months to ensure safe and optimal performance.

faqs.question: Does the center offer a warranty after repair?
faqs.answer: Yes, all services at the center come with a clear warranty policy depending on the repair type.

faqs.question: Do I need to book an appointment in advance?
faqs.answer: You can visit directly, but scheduling an appointment helps save time and ensures quicker service.

faqs.question: What kind of spare parts do you use?
faqs.answer: We guarantee to use 100% genuine parts or parts from authorized manufacturers.

services.title: Comprehensive Maintenance
services.description: Thorough vehicle inspection and maintenance for safe operation.

services.title: Scheduled Oil Change
services.description: Use of genuine oil for smooth engine performance.

services.title: Technical Repairs
services.description: Handling all technical issues from simple to complex.

founding.title: The Founding Story
founding.content: XYZ Maintenance Center was founded in 2013 by a group of passionate motorcycle engineers. Starting from a small garage with only 2 staff members, the center went through many challenges, from lack of equipment to building customer trust. Through dedication and the desire to elevate service standards, we gradually rose to become one of the most trusted maintenance centers in the region.

milestones.description: Established the center at small scale in Binh Thanh District.
Expanded with 2 branches and invested in modern equipment.
Team grew to 30 technicians, serving over 10,000 customers annually.
Received excellent service certification and expanded to 5 citywide branches.

activities.title: Free maintenance program for ambulances
activities.description: Our center supported frontline healthcare during the COVID-19 pandemic.

activities.title: Scholarship for young technicians
activities.description: Providing training and scholarships for students in automotive and motorcycle repair.

staffSection.heading: Our Staff
staffSection.description: XYZ Center is proud to have a team of skilled, experienced, and dedicated technicians. Each member holds professional certifications and undergoes thorough training.

members.name: Le Van C
members.quote: Every vehicle is a challenge – and I love it!

technologies.description: Reduces service time and ensures precise oil replacement.
